# AB Aluminum & Screens

Licensed aluminum outdoor-structure contractor in South Florida.

## Services
Aluminum pergolas, pool screen enclosures, patio screen rooms, screen rooms, motorized louvered roof systems, patio covers, and custom aluminum structures. Every project includes a free 3D design and in-house permitting.

## Area served
Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties (Florida).

## Engineering & credentials
All structures are engineered to the Miami-Dade HVHZ (High-Velocity Hurricane Zone) wind-load code, rated up to 175 mph. Licensed & insured, with an in-house installation crew. FL contractor license: {{LICENSE}}. 15+ years in business, 500+ projects completed.

## Contact
Phone (English): (786) 383-6066
Phone (Español): (786) 340-5157
Email: info@abaluminumandscreens.com
Website: https://www.abaluminumandscreens.com
Financing: available through Synchrony Bank.
